title: RESUME HERE — checkpoint 2026-04-29
html:
RESUME HERE — Checkpoint 2026-04-29 (post-truth-cleanup)

The ALL-CAPS underscore name sorts this to the TOP of your Obsidian file tree. Open this first when you come back.

⚡ TL;DR — what's wired, what's truthful, what's open

The brain is built. The trigger fires. The truth audit caught real lies and cleaned them. ~85% of graph edges are truthful, up from ~67%.

What you can do RIGHT NOW (no setup):

  • Drop ? <question> in raw/inbox/ from inside Obsidian (Mac OR phone) → answer in wiki/queries/ within 5 min. No terminal needed.
  • Or ba "<question>" in Mac terminal — same result
  • Open any synthesis page → ⌘P → "Open local graph" → the actual mind-map experience (the global cmd+G is a hairball; local graph is where thinking happens)

What's deferred: see "📦 Pick this up later" below.

🔫 The trigger — daily-use commands

ba "your question"          # ask — past-you, cited
bc "decision"               # counsel — past-you argues both sides, anti-flattery brake
bs                          # surprise — one unexpected connection
bo "topic"                  # origin — when did this thread first appear?
bx                          # contradict — past-you vs present-you
brain promote <query>       # turn a query into a real synthesis page
brain similar <path>        # top-15 semantic neighbors
brain inbox-status          # is the watcher listening?
brain transcribe <file>     # re-transcribe with --model=large for hallucinated memos

Phone path (zero terminal): iPhone Obsidian → raw/inbox/ → new note with first line ? <question> → save → 5 min → answer in wiki/queries/. The launchd watcher is ON (silent background polling every 60s).

For decisions: prefix with counsel: instead of ? (e.g., ? counsel: should I take this contract?).

Always read "## You may have forgotten you wrote…" section FIRST in any answer — that's the callback.

✅ What's wired (verified state as of 2026-04-29)

Component State
Trigger CLI Live — 17 verbs in bin/brain.zsh
brain ask semantic pre-filter Calls similar.py first, grep fallback if sentence-transformers missing
brain ask auto-promote On (regex-gated, capped 1/ask · disable with BRAIN_NO_AUTO_PROMOTE=1)
brain promote back-link sweep Cited entities/concepts get ## Synthesized in
0-byte query guard Empty outputs deleted, no cost log entry, loud stderr
launchd brain-inbox watcher Loaded · 60s polling · silent
launchd brain-densify cron Sunday 2am weekly
Smart Connections (brain similar) sentence-transformers 5.1.2 installed, 2,489 embeddings indexed
Cost log (REAL, not heuristic) bin/.brain-cost.log; 30d summary in brain status. Real cost ~$25/mo at 5 asks/day (was 8.3× under-reported before fix)
20-asks nudge Triggers in brain status at N≥20
Phone status surface wiki/_INBOX-STATUS.md (Dataview blocks + live CLI section)
Queries index wiki/queries/_INDEX.md (Dataview-sortable)
ExcaliBrain hierarchy inferAllLinksAsFriends: false; 7 syntheses parent/child/friend wired
Densified concept pages ~143 (113 wave-1 + 30 wave-2)
4 narrative canvases China · OSU CS · relationship-eval · AEO/Rankett (in wiki/canvases/)
Voice memos pipeline 41 imported via SQLite + whisper-cpp Metal · 22 complete + 18 hallucinated (deferred) + 1 too-short
Apple Notes 2026-04-28 batch 56 new summaries with authored-by: yahir discipline
CLAUDE.md hardened 3 new structural rules: speaker attribution, wikilink discipline, evidence quality
Truth audit (full pass) 943 false-hub edges removed (~725 high-confidence + ~218 borderline)
8 third-party-voice contaminations Fixed with explicit (speaker: <name>; not Yahir)
5 synthesis overclaims Rewritten — see commit 8ef9ee9 for the receipts
5 UTC-as-local timestamp errors Corrected (the "phantom late-night cluster" was partly real, partly evening writing)
wiki/sources/ + wiki/clusters/ New directories for source-labels and aggregator pages — excluded from graph view
Obsidian Git auto-commit Restored to 10-min interval

What your brain has noticed (open these in Obsidian)

Synthesis essays (wiki/synthesis/):

  • family as hidden runway — evidence-quality: high · cleanest essay in the corpus · the no-runway identity vs the actual ledger
  • founder loneliness 2022 2026 — the empty foxhole pattern
  • the china chapter as comparative anthropology — Shanghai → Rankett gatekeeping
  • from fitness to software the brotein arc — the pivot
  • voluntary adversity as philosophy — now correctly framed as adoption-not-coinage of YEBW axioms
  • brotein as rankett prototype — schema as spec sheet, Aug 2025 was already Rankett architecture
  • late night writing as domestic shanghai — now: "the condition is solitude, not strictly hour"
  • post china limbo — Jan-Aug 2025 corridor between China and Austin
  • cam jipp pre rankett idea — Summer 2024 PHIB-relaunch workshop (your earliest co-founder-shaped artifact)
  • aeo competitor arc — the 9-week Peekaboo collision Sept-Nov 2025

Compounding queries (see INDEX for full Dataview list):

  • forgotten thread from 2022 2023 — the COBOL ghost
  • the Té Amo plan you walked away from
  • Brotein schema = Rankett architecture
  • contradiction pricing vs broke — five money-voices in your head
  • recurring theme you havent named — writing-as-exit

📦 Pick this up later — the deferred plan (~90 min total, ~$35)

When you come back, this is what's queued. In priority order:

Phase 1: Reliability — kill the iCloud-sync flimsiness (~30 min, $0)

Three launchd plists with WatchPaths instead of polling (fires on file mtime change, not schedule):

Plist Watches Fires
com.yahir.apple-notes-watcher ~/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.notes/NoteStore.sqlite import-apple-notes.py (within seconds of iCloud sync completing)
com.yahir.voice-memos-watcher ~/Library/Group Containers/group.com.apple.VoiceMemos.shared/Recordings/ scripts/import-voice-memos.py (when new .m4a appears)
com.yahir.gdocs-cron every 6h on schedule bin/gdocs_sync.py (Drive API — no iCloud dep)
com.yahir.brain-ingest Sunday 2am brain ingest (sums up the week's new content)

Honest caveat: Apple Notes can't fully escape iCloud (no third-party push API). Best we can do is fire on sync-completion event instead of polling on schedule. Drops lag from "up to 12h" to "seconds after iCloud finishes."

Optional Phase 1b — GitHub Action mirror for Google Docs. Runs every 6h independent of your Mac being on/off. Belt-and-suspenders for cloud monitoring. ~30 min extra setup.

Phase 2: Second truth audit — the 1,000 not-yet-individually-checked summaries (45 min, ~$30)

The first audit sampled 40 random wikilinks + 5 synthesis essays + top 20 hubs. ~1,000 summaries weren't individually quote-verified. The new CLAUDE.md guards apply to FUTURE ingests but old content could still have:

  • Third-party-voice misattributions at scale (the YBW pattern in older summaries)
  • Fabricated quotes (the "TikTok+leaderboard+share" pattern — 1 caught, more may exist)
  • More UTC-as-local timestamp errors

Approach: 5 parallel hostile-audit agents on date-sliced batches. Sample 5 quotes per summary against source via grep verification. Flag fabrications + misattributions. Should push truthfulness from ~85% → 95%+.

Phase 3: Cleanup-validation of the borderline 218 edges (15 min, ~$5)

Of the 943 edges removed, ~725 were high-confidence false-hub but ~218 were borderline (could've stayed as wikilinks vs converted to tags). Sample those 218 and verify:

  • Truly stylistic/categorical (right call)?
  • Or semantic content that lost a real edge?

For any losing real semantic content: re-add as wikilinks with correct phrasing.

Phase 4 (small): Templater hotkey for friction-free node creation (~10 min, $0)

Install Obsidian Templater plugin → bind ⌘⇧N to a template that auto-generates kebab-case filename + paste-ready frontmatter. You type the title, it generates the ceremony. Fixes the "kebab-case + frontmatter is too much friction" complaint.

❓ Open questions you raised (honest answers for when you come back)

Q: Can monitoring run on a VPS / GitHub Action?
A: Partial. Apple Notes can't (locked to your Mac's container — no public push API). Google Docs can (Drive API works from anywhere). Best architecture: your Mac as always-running watcher (it already is) with WatchPaths instead of polling. See Phase 1.

Q: How am I so positive about 943 false-hub edges?
A: I overclaimed certainty. Honest breakdown: ~725 were definitely-noise; ~218 were borderline (could've stayed). Phase 3 validates the borderline batch.

Q: Are wikilinks intensely accurate and truthful?
A: ~85% truthful after today's cleanup, up from ~67%. New CLAUDE.md guards block the worst patterns going forward. Phase 2 audit pass would push toward 95%+.

Q: Can I ask from inside Obsidian instead of terminal?
A: YES — already wired. Drop ? <question> in raw/inbox/ from inside Obsidian (Mac OR phone). Watcher fires within 60 sec. Try it before assuming you need anything else built.

Q: The kebab-case + frontmatter ceremony is too much friction.
A: Right. See Phase 4 (Templater hotkey, ~10 min).

🛠️ When you come back, do this in order

  1. Open this file — verify the status block matches reality
  2. brain status — see 30-day spend + ask cumulative
  3. brain inbox-status — verify watcher alive (launchctl list | grep brain should show exit 0)
  4. Open wiki/queries/_INDEX.md — browse what brain has already answered
  5. Fire a real question — phone (drop in raw/inbox/) or terminal (ba "...")
  6. Read the "## You may have forgotten you wrote…" section first — that's the callback
  7. Decide whether to execute Phase 1/2/3/4 from the plan above

🟡 What's STILL gray (honest)

  • iOS Shortcut "Ask Brain" — skip; phone path doesn't need it (just drop file in raw/inbox/)
  • iMessage / sent email / Twitter ingest — deferred until 20+ asks fired (the nudge will tell you when)
  • 18 hallucinated voice memos — re-transcribe with brain transcribe --model=large when convenient
  • ~339 low-value Google Docs — most are scholarship forms/lease drafts/logistics. Deferred unless brain ask ever surfaces a real gap. Goal-calibration audit found only ~25-35% high-value.
  • 16 pre-existing summaries using "prefigures" in ordinary historical-precursor sense — preserved (not the YBW gospel pattern); listed in commit 7ecd554 if you want to triage individually
  • 2 broken sentence fragments — 1 fixed (fear-of-not-doing.md line 20); the other one the agent claimed didn't actually exist on closer inspection

Session commits (for archaeology)

Recent session arc, newest first:

  • c88f9b6 — fix Obsidian EPERM (removed voice-memos-audio symlink)
  • 7ecd554 — surgical ingest: 56 apple-notes + broken-fragment fix
  • 8ef9ee9 — truth cleanup: 4-agent pass corrects overclaims, demotes pretender hubs
  • ee6bd0f — true-second-brain pass closes graph audit gaps
  • 190355e — voice memos v2: SQLite + whisper-cpp Metal pipeline
  • 08c08fd — voice-memos + cost-accuracy fixes (8.3x under-reporting fixed)
  • f24fa26 — trigger v3: 5 agents close every audit gap
  • c2faccc — trigger v1: brain ask + counsel + inbox watcher
  • b8b0602 — wave 7 ingest: 275 screenshots → Tier-1 micro summaries
  • dfdab3c — wave 6 ingest + 3 efficiency agents

GitHub remote: https://github.com/YG4PRESIDENT/SecondBrain (private)
